name: wrong_function_finance_pm
description: Finance / trading PM — completely wrong domain and function for Aakash. Should score Low.

job.title: Senior Product Manager — Trading Platform
job.full_description: Goldman Sachs is hiring a Senior PM for its equities trading platform. You will own the roadmap for algorithmic trading tools, risk management dashboards, and market data feeds. Requirements: 7+ years in financial services product management, deep understanding of FIX protocol, equities or derivatives trading domain expertise required, Series 7 or equivalent license preferred. Experience with Bloomberg Terminal, market microstructure, and regulatory compliance (MiFID II). Strong quantitative background essential.
